testimonials.name: Sarah Mitchell
testimonials.text: Kilicare+ changed how I explore Tanzania. The AI guide answered every question in perfect English, and the SOS feature gave me peace of mind hiking Kilimanjaro. Absolutely world-class app!

testimonials.name: Abdullah Al-Rashid
testimonials.text: I found the best guide through this app. Booking was easy, M-Pesa payments worked perfectly, and the Serengeti experience was better than my dreams.

testimonials.name: Amara Diallo
testimonials.text: As a local guide, Kilicare+ transformed my business. I get 10x more bookings, the payment protection system protects me and my clients, and the insights show me where to improve.

testimonials.name: Chen Wei
testimonials.text: The experience feed is amazing — I could see real moments from other travelers before booking. Kilicare Play's football insights are fun and engaging for match days!

testimonials.name: Fatima Nkrumah
testimonials.text: The best safari in Africa! I've traveled to 23 countries but Tanzania and Kilicare+ were completely different. The app understands our culture and language.

testimonials.name: Marco Rossi
testimonials.text: The Moments feed helped me find incredible photography spots. Connected with a local guide through chat, booked instantly via M-Pesa. Shot the most beautiful wildlife photos of my career.
